ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "robot_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the robot */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the robot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the robot */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the robot started its operation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the robot ended its operation */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* The production line the robot is assigned to */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* The last maintenance date */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* The next maintenance due date */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* The current battery level of the robot */,
  "operational_hours" REAL /* The total operational hours of the robot */,
  "last_anomaly" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last detected anomaly */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robots_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES robot_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robots_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES robot_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement record */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the movement was recorded */,
  "seconds_since_started" REAL /* Seconds elapsed since the robot started */,
  "posX" REAL /* X-coordinate of the robot's position */,
  "posY" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the robot's position */,
  "posZ" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the robot's position */,
  "rotX" REAL /* X-coordinate of the robot's orientation */,
  "rotY" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the robot's orientation */,
  "rotZ" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the robot's orientation */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Speed of the robot at each movement */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the robot at each movement */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption during each movement */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions at the time of movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the robot model */,
  "specs" TEXT /* Specifications of the robot model */,
  "max_operational_hours" REAL /* Maximum operational hours before maintenance is required */,
  "max_battery_capacity" REAL /* Maximum battery capacity */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Recommended maintenance interval in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot performing the operation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the operation started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the operation ended */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation performed by the robot */,
  "operation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the operation */,
  "operation_result" TEXT /* Result of the operation */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the operation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_operations_operation_type FOREIGN KEY ("operation_type") REFERENCES operation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_operations_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot experiencing the issue */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the issue was detected */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue */,
  "issue_duration" REAL /* Duration of the issue */,
  "resolution_time" REAL /* Time it took to resolve the issue */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions at the time of the issue */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_issues_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_issues_severity FOREIGN KEY ("severity") REFERENCES issue_severity ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot that underwent maintenance */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the maintenance */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)
